욥기 27:1.content: Job again took up his parable, and said,

욥기 27:2.content: “As God lives, who has taken away my right, the Almighty, who has made my soul bitter

욥기 27:3.content: (for the length of my life is still in me, and the spirit of God is in my nostrils);

욥기 27:4.content: surely my lips will not speak unrighteousness, neither will my tongue utter deceit.

욥기 27:5.content: Far be it from me that I should justify you. Until I die I will not put away my integrity from me.

욥기 27:6.content: I hold fast to my righteousness, and will not let it go. My heart will not reproach me so long as I live.

욥기 27:7.content: “Let my enemy be as the wicked. Let him who rises up against me be as the unrighteous.

욥기 27:8.content: For what is the hope of the godless, when he is cut off, when God takes away his life?

욥기 27:9.content: Will God hear his cry when trouble comes on him?

욥기 27:10.content: Will he delight himself in the Almighty, and call on God at all times?

욥기 27:11.content: I will teach you about the hand of God. I will not conceal that which is with the Almighty.

욥기 27:12.content: Behold, all of you have seen it yourselves; why then have you become altogether vain?

욥기 27:13.content: “This is the portion of a wicked man with God, the heritage of oppressors, which they receive from the Almighty.

욥기 27:14.content: If his children are multiplied, it is for the sword. His offspring will not be satisfied with bread.

욥기 27:15.content: Those who remain of him will be buried in death. His widows will make no lamentation.

욥기 27:16.content: Though he heap up silver as the dust, and prepare clothing as the clay;

욥기 27:17.content: he may prepare it, but the just will put it on, and the innocent will divide the silver.

욥기 27:18.content: He builds his house as the moth, as a booth which the watchman makes.

욥기 27:19.content: He lies down rich, but he will not do so again. He opens his eyes, and he is not.

욥기 27:20.content: Terrors overtake him like waters. A storm steals him away in the night.

욥기 27:21.content: The east wind carries him away, and he departs. It sweeps him out of his place.

욥기 27:22.content: For it hurls at him, and does not spare, as he flees away from his hand.

욥기 27:23.content: Men will clap their hands at him, and will hiss him out of his place.
